test.note: Only pre-existing fixture-dependent tests fail (missing REFERENCE/ directory). All synthetic tests pass: go test ./internal/kfx/... -count=1 -run '^Test[^CBS]' exits 0.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on how to map Python OOP instance-level state to Go. Current pattern uses package-level globals with reset functions (e.g., reportedErrors + ResetReportedErrors). This should be documented as an accepted pattern or a struct-scoped alternative should be preferred.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m5-low-severity-fixes: LogErrorOnce uses package-level var reportedErrors while Python uses self.reported_errors instance attribute. This pattern recurs throughout the codebase where Python OOP state is flattened to Go package-level state.
